title: Drag Racing Events
description: Array of structured drag racing event records extracted from track websites and event flyers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the event (UUID v4).

title.description: Full event name as shown on the flyer or listing.

event_type.description: Primary type of drag racing event.

series.description: Sanctioning body or series name (e.g. NHRA, IHRA, or a local bracket series). Null if not specified.

classes.description: Racing classes or categories listed on the flyer (e.g. 'Super Pro', 'Pro', '5.90 Index').

confidence.description: Extraction confidence score (0.0–1.0). Reflects how clearly the source material presented the data. Values below 0.5 should be treated with caution.

unclear_fields.description: Field names where the extracted value was uncertain. Consumers may wish to flag or exclude these fields.

notes.description: Additional information from the flyer not captured by structured fields.

flyers.description: Source flyer images or listings that contributed to this event record. Multiple entries indicate the event appeared across more than one source.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when this event record was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when this event record was last modified.

id.description: Stable URL-safe slug for the track (e.g. 'texas-motorplex-tx'). Derived from track name and state by the pipeline. Use this for filtering instead of fuzzy-matching name strings.

city.description: City where the track is located. Null if not determinable from the source.

state.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation (e.g. 'TX'). Null if not determinable.

start.description: Event start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end.description: Event end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Null for single-day events.

gates_open.description: Time gates open in 24-hour HH:MM format. Null if not specified.

registration_opens.description: Registration open time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Null if not specified.

race_start.description: First round start time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Null if not specified.

entry.description: Entry fee as printed on the flyer (e.g. '$60/class', '$100 per car'). Raw string — not normalized.

spectator.description: Spectator admission fee as printed on the flyer. Raw string — not normalized.

phone.description: Contact phone number as printed on the flyer.

file.description: Filename of the source flyer image, or source URL for text-based listings.

phash.description: Perceptual hash (pHash) of the flyer image used for duplicate detection. Null for text-based listings.

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when this flyer was processed.
